title: DEKTON Revolving Punch Pliers - Heavy Duty Multi-Function Hole Punch Tool for Leather, Plastic, and Paper - Adjustable 6 Interchangeable Punch Sizes, Comfortable Ergonomic Grip
features: Versatile Punching Tool: The DEKTON Revolving Punch Pliers feature six interchangeable punch sizes, making them perfect for creating precise holes in leather, plastic, and paper. This multi-functionality ensures you have the right punch for various projects, whether for DIY tasks or professional use.

Heavy-Duty Construction: Crafted for durability, these pliers are built to handle tough materials with ease. Their robust design ensures long-lasting performance, making them a reliable tool for frequent use in demanding tasks.

Adjustable Punch Sizes: Easily switch between six different punch sizes to accommodate various hole diameters. This adjustable feature provides flexibility and precision for different applications, enhancing the tool's versatility.

Ergonomic Grip: Designed with a comfortable, ergonomic grip, these pliers reduce hand strain and fatigue during extended use. The ergonomic handle ensures a secure, comfortable hold, allowing for precise control and effortless operation in single stamping

Ideal for Diverse Uses: Whether you're working on leather crafting, plastic fabrication, or paper projects, the DEKTON Revolving Punch Pliers are your go-to tool. Their adaptability and ease of use make them suitable for both DIY enthusiasts and professionals.
description: Product Description Ideal for making holes in belts, leather, soft plastic and rubber. 6 different punches. Ergonomic Anti slip grips. Spring loaded handles. Box Contains 1 x revolving punch plier
